description: Measure the width of Horseshoe Falls and American Falls at Niagara Falls. Create four placemarks at the endpoints: 'Horseshoe Falls West End', 'Horseshoe Falls East End', 'American Falls South End', and 'American Falls North End' at the visible crest of each waterfall. Organize them in a folder named 'Niagara Falls Measurements' with the measured widths noted in the folder description. Export to /home/ga/Documents/niagara_falls_measurements.kml.
